_comment: Known-drift check_id aliases (check_vocab.py semantic guard). Each entry is an explicit, human-approved rename: variant id the model has been seen emitting -> the canonical brain-mappings id for the SAME check. Use this table for renames the stopword-stripped token-overlap test cannot prove on its own (acronyms, synonyms). The variant's letter+number slot must match the canonical's — check_vocab refuses cross-slot entries.
